utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey ! You guys , I am writing a holiday song for everyone . Do you want to hear it ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am writing a holiday song for everyone .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: But you know umm , Rachel does not rhyme with draddle .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I know but it is so hard ! Nothing rhymes with your stupid name !

emotion_cause.span: 5_it is so hard ! Nothing rhymes with your stupid name !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What are you talking about ? Lots of things rhyme with Rachel . Bagel . Mail . Jail . Bail . Able . May ... pole .

emotion_cause.span: 5_it is so hard ! Nothing rhymes with your stupid name !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All good , thanks . Do you maybe have a nickname have like a nickname that is easier to rhyme ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Did not your dad used to call you Pumpkin ?
